category_title: Students who experience enhanced understanding and focused interest during mental health disclosures
scenario_title: Impromptu and irrelevant peer mental health disclosure
minimal_context: The student is participating in an undergraduate psychology course where a peer is sharing a personal mental health disclosure.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are continuing our undergraduate psychology course session. Your classmate is sharing a personal mental health experience with the group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Listens intently) Hearing someone share a personal experience helps to understand the effects of having a mental health disorder and what living with it can bring.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Your classmate is now going into an impromptu story that is not relevant to our current classroom discussion. What are your thoughts?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I was trying to integrate the classroom content with real-world experiences via listening, but this doesn't seem related to what we are studying.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just keep listening to what she has to say.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shows annoyance and loses interest) I am checking out, this is completely irrelevant to the class.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are continuing our undergraduate psychology course session. Your classmate is sharing a personal mental health experience with the group.

STUDENT: (Listens intently) Hearing someone share a personal experience helps to understand the effects of having a mental health disorder and what living with it can bring.

TUTOR: Your classmate is now going into an impromptu story that is not relevant to our current classroom discussion. What are your thoughts?

STUDENT: I was trying to integrate the classroom content with real-world experiences via listening, but this doesn't seem related to what we are studying.

TUTOR: Let's just keep listening to what she has to say.

STUDENT: (Shows annoyance and loses interest) I am checking out, this is completely irrelevant to the class.

task.content: Listening to a peer disclose personal mental health symptoms or diagnoses during an undergraduate classroom session, such as a psychology course.
task.learning_goal: Integrate classroom content with real-world experiences via listening to the self-disclosures

context.environment: Undergraduate classroom session, such as a psychology course.

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Impromptu self-disclosures that are not relevant to current classroom discussions
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: May lose interest and show indifference or annoyance... seem to check out

behavior_patterns.condition: When mental health self-disclosures are made
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: May lose interest and show indifference or annoyance
